name: Chinese: Oriental Pistachio Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8  Chicken breasts, halved, boned and skinned
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken breasts with garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat safflower oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken breasts to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 4-5 minutes per side.
4. In a saucepan, combine beef broth, cornstarch, wine, and oyster sauce. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Stir in chopped green onions and pistachios into the sauce.
7. Prepare rice noodles according to package directions.
8. Place cooked noodles on a heated serving dish.
9. Arrange chicken breasts on top of the noodles.
10. Pour the prepared sauce over the chicken.
11. Garnish with additional pistachios, if desired.
Creme de Colorado Cookbook (1987) From the collection of Jim Vorheis
